Object# Subscription.Attributes

App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
object Subscription.Attributes
```

## [Properties](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/subscription/attributes-data.dictionary#properties)

`familySharable``boolean`

`name``string`

`productId``string`

`reviewNote``string`

`state``string`

 Possible Values: `MISSING_METADATA, READY_TO_SUBMIT, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, IN_REVIEW, DEVELOPER_ACTION_NEEDED, PENDING_BINARY_APPROVAL, APPROVED, DEVELOPER_REMOVED_FROM_SALE, REMOVED_FROM_SALE, REJECTED``subscriptionPeriod``string`

 Possible Values: `ONE_WEEK, ONE_MONTH, TWO_MONTHS, THREE_MONTHS, SIX_MONTHS, ONE_YEAR``groupLevel``integer`
